description_long: This is a vintage-style lantern with a weathered, rusted metal frame and a clear glass enclosure at its center. The lantern features a cylindrical glass globe protected by a wire guard, which is held in place by two vertical metal supports. The top section has a vented cap with a small handle, allowing for easy carrying or hanging. The base is broad and circular, providing stability when placed on flat surfaces. The overall appearance suggests it is an oil lamp, commonly used in outdoor or rustic urban settings. The surface is predominantly dark brown with visible rust, giving it an aged, utilitarian look.
description: A weathered, rusted metal lantern with a clear glass globe and protective wire guard, featuring a vented cap and sturdy base. Its vintage design suggests use as an oil lamp in outdoor or urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full glass globe, wire guard, and both vertical supports clearly, with the vented cap and handle visible on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the glass globe and the thickness of the metal frame, with the wire guard partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the fill cap or knob on the side more visible, and the wire guard and supports mirrored.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the cylindrical glass and metal frame, with the wire guard partially visible.
